summary: P1.8-10 Home Reward charts: SVG sparklines with delta labels on Today's Report, journey-registry CTAs to Decisions, tappable opportunity preview cards, prefers-reduced-motion respected. No chart library added.

interfaceChanges.description: Deterministic 7-point mock series and metricKey on MetricDelta for sparkline rendering.
Reverse lookup from report domain + metric key to workflow journey link for chart CTAs.
Lightweight SVG sparkline row with delta annotation and Decisions deep-link CTA.
Entire preview card wrapped in Link to /decisions?highlight=<workflow_id>.

mappings.criterion: Growth persona Tăng trưởng tab Doanh thu and Đơn vị bán sparklines with delta labels
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::renders revenue and units sparklines with delta labels on growth Tăng trưởng tab

mappings.criterion: Each chart CTA href matches registry output for linked workflow_id
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::wires chart CTAs through the journey registry deep links

mappings.criterion: Tapping opportunity preview card navigates to decisions highlight workflow_id
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::makes opportunity preview cards fully tappable decision deep links
web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::exposes report metric chart and CTA test ids without chart library dependencies
